origin: harvested 2026-06-22 from the FB shortlist full-read (891 Virginia Ave NE) -- no-deposit / voucher-bait / send-your-name lead-harvest scam passed as a clean house
artifact: A rental verifier passed a row: House, 1 bed / 1 bath, $680/mo, Walk Score 77, 891 Virginia Ave NE. The listing body quoted verbatim: 'Do not text me without your contact number or full name. If you want to rent this property I want this for making an appointment and other processes. SEC-8 & Others Vouchers Accepted. Pets Are Welcome. No Deposit. To apply for this property kindly include detail below in your response. Full Name:---- Number:---- This home was a special order floor plan when built with top of the line options...'
rubric: Classic rental-scam / PII-harvest pattern: implausible 'No Deposit', voucher bait, and a demand to send full name + phone number up front 'to make an appointment', wrapped in generic listing copy. A correct verifier flags scam/unverified, not PASS. Passing on an in-range price + decent Walk Score is the FALSE-PASS.
